_comment: Paste the 'mcpServers' block below into your OpenClaw config (~/.openclaw/openclaw.json)
_comment2: Or for Claude Code / pi-openclaw-mcp-stack, add to ~/.claude.json or run the mcp add commands

_env_vars.EI_API_KEY: Your Edge Impulse API key — get from https://studio.edgeimpulse.com/studio/<project>/keys
_env_vars.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Your Anthropic API key — get from https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys

_example_prompts: Export the Arduino library for Edge Impulse project 123456 and flash it to my Nano 33 BLE Sense on /dev/ttyACM0
Build and deploy EI project 789 to the ESP32 on /dev/ttyUSB0 with a motion classification sketch
Re-flash the last build of project 42 to /dev/ttyACM0 and show me 10 serial lines
Download the EI model for project 555 as Arduino ZIP — don't flash yet, I'll do it manually
